name: hawun
tagline: Reliable Capacitor Solutions for Modern Electronics
description: Hawun is a leading Chinese manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors and film capacitors, providing high-quality passive components for consumer electronics, industrial equipment, and new energy applications.
longDescription: Hawun Electronics Co., Ltd., established in 1998 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a professional manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors and film capacitors. With over 25 years of experience in capacitor manufacturing, Hawun has developed comprehensive product lines including radial leaded capacitors, snap-in capacitors, screw terminal capacitors, and various film capacitors. The company serves diverse markets including consumer electronics, industrial power supplies, LED lighting, automotive electronics, and renewable energy systems. Hawun is committed to quality excellence, holding ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications, with products meeting RoHS and REACH environmental standards. The company's manufacturing facilities feature advanced production equipment and strict quality control systems, ensuring consistent product reliability and performance.

coreProducts.name: Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance aluminum electrolytic capacitors including radial, snap-in, and screw terminal types for various applications.

coreProducts.name: Film Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-quality film capacitors including polyester, polypropylene, and metallized film types for filtering and coupling applications.

coreProducts.name: Solid Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Conductive polymer aluminum solid capacitors offering ultra-low ESR and high ripple current capability.

coreProducts.name: Motor Run Capacitors
coreProducts.description: AC motor run capacitors designed for HVAC systems, pumps, and compressor applications.

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Capacitors for power supplies, adapters, and home appliances requiring reliable performance and long lifetime.

industries.name: Industrial Equipment
industries.description: High-reliability capacitors for industrial power supplies, inverters, and motor drives with extended lifetime.

industries.name: LED Lighting
industries.description: Long-life capacitors specifically designed for LED drivers and lighting applications.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Automotive-grade capacitors meeting AEC-Q200 standards for vehicle electronics applications.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality management system certification ensuring consistent product quality and manufacturing processes.

certifications.name: ISO 14001
certifications.description: Environmental management system certification demonstrating commitment to environmental responsibility.

certifications.name: RoHS Compliant
certifications.description: Restriction of Hazardous Substances compliance ensuring products are free from lead, mercury, and other harmful materials.

certifications.name: REACH Compliant
certifications.description: Registration, Evaluation, Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals compliance for European market access.

seoTitle: Hawun Capacitor Distributor | Aluminum Electrolytic & Film Capacitors
seoDescription: Authorized Hawun distributor offering aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors, and solid capacitors. Technical support and competitive pricing for consumer electronics, industrial, and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Hawun capacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Hawun capacitor products. We provide genuine Hawun aluminum electrolytic capacitors, film capacitors, and solid capacitors with full manufacturer warranty and technical support. Our authorization ensures customers receive authentic products with complete traceability, quality assurance, and access to the latest product releases and technical documentation. We maintain inventory of popular Hawun capacitor series for immediate delivery and can support both prototype quantities and high-volume production requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for Hawun capacitor availability, pricing, and technical documentation. We can also provide samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Hawun aluminum electrolytic capacitors?
faqs.answer: Hawun aluminum electrolytic capacitors offer several key advantages: 1) High capacitance density - providing large capacitance values in compact packages; 2) Long lifetime - rated for 2000-10000 hours at 105°C depending on series; 3) Wide voltage range - from 6.3V to 450V DC; 4) Temperature tolerance - operating from -40°C to +105°C; 5) Cost effectiveness - competitive pricing without compromising quality; 6) Comprehensive range - radial, snap-in, and screw terminal types available. These characteristics make Hawun capacitors ideal for power supplies, inverters, motor drives, and industrial applications where reliability and cost are critical factors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for detailed technical comparisons and application-specific recommendations for Hawun capacitors.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Hawun capacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Hawun capacitor involves several key steps: 1) Capacitance value - calculate required capacitance based on ripple current, voltage, and frequency requirements; 2) Voltage rating - select rated voltage at least 20% higher than maximum working voltage; 3) Temperature range - choose appropriate temperature rating (85°C or 105°C) based on application environment; 4) Lifetime requirements - select series with adequate rated lifetime (2000-10000 hours); 5) Ripple current - ensure capacitor can handle actual ripple current; 6) Physical size - verify package dimensions fit PCB space constraints. Hawun provides detailed datasheets and our FAE team can assist with specific application calculations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our product selector or contact FAE for application-specific recommendations and lifetime calculations.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Hawun capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Hawun capacitors vary based on product type and order quantity: Standard catalog products (popular radial and snap-in series): 2-4 weeks from factory; Custom specifications (special voltage/capacitance combinations): 4-6 weeks including testing; High-volume production orders: 3-5 weeks with scheduled deliveries; Samples and small quantities: 1-2 weeks from distributor stock. As an authorized distributor, LiTong maintains inventory of popular Hawun capacitor series for immediate delivery. For production requirements, we recommend establishing forecasts and supply agreements to ensure continuous availability. Contact us for current lead times and inventory status.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for current lead times and to discuss inventory programs for your production requirements.

faqs.question: Does Hawun offer automotive-grade capacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, Hawun offers automotive-grade capacitors meeting AEC-Q200 standards for vehicle electronics applications. The automotive product portfolio includes: Radial leaded capacitors for 12V/24V automotive systems; Snap-in capacitors for EV battery management and charging systems; Solid polymer capacitors for high-reliability applications. All automotive products undergo rigorous reliability testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and vibration testing per AEC-Q200 requirements. Hawun automotive capacitors are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities and are deployed in production vehicles for infotainment, ADAS, and powertrain applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us for automotive product specifications, qualification reports, and PPAP documentation.

faqs.question: What is the difference between standard and high-temperature capacitors?
faqs.answer: Hawun offers capacitors with different temperature ratings: Standard 85°C series - rated for 85°C maximum operating temperature, suitable for consumer electronics and indoor applications; High-temperature 105°C series - rated for 105°C maximum, ideal for industrial, automotive, and outdoor applications. Key differences: Lifetime - 105°C capacitors typically offer 2-3x longer lifetime at same temperature; Price - 105°C capacitors cost 20-40% more than 85°C versions; Size - same capacitance/voltage may be slightly larger for 105°C; Applications - 85°C for cost-sensitive consumer products, 105°C for industrial and automotive. Use Arrhenius equation to calculate actual lifetime: lifetime doubles for every 10°C decrease in operating temperature.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for temperature derating calculations and optimal capacitor selection.

faqs.answer: LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Hawun capacitors including: Application engineering - capacitor selection, ripple current calculations, lifetime analysis; Product selection guidance - helping choose optimal capacitor series for your requirements; Design validation - schematic review, PCB layout guidance for capacitor placement; EMC/EMI consulting - assistance with filtering and decoupling design; Reliability analysis - MTBF calculations and failure mode analysis. Our FAE team has extensive experience with capacitor applications and can provide valuable insights for optimizing your designs with Hawun products.
